ques: Search 'Poly encoder' by title on ArXiv and check whether the articles in the search results provide HTML access.
answer: No — none of the 3 title-search results for "Poly encoder" (arXiv:2506.00968, arXiv:2309.16770, arXiv:1905.01969) provide HTML access. Their available formats are only PDF (plus PS/"other"); no "html" link is shown for any of them.
